capabilities.name: Sales
capabilities.description: Lead-to-cash demand and revenue management: capturing demand, qualifying and progressing opportunities, quoting, closing orders, and billing.
components: Auto-Create Deal Desk Review on Strategic Deal

capabilities.name: Customer Service
capabilities.description: End-to-end management of customer support: case intake and routing, SLA and entitlement governance, knowledge management, resolution, and voice-of-customer feedback.
components: Phase to First Response and Resolution
Auto-Route New Cases to Tier Queue
Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback

capabilities.name: Field Service
capabilities.description: End-to-end management of on-site service delivery: work order intake, scheduling and dispatch, on-site execution, asset servicing, inventory/returns, and agreement-based recurring maintenance.
components: Auto-Create Safety Inspection for Hazardous Work Orders

capabilities.name: Project Operations
capabilities.description: End-to-end project-based service delivery: sell, plan, resource, deliver, and bill projects with cost/margin control.

capabilities.name: Customer Insights - Journeys (Marketing)
capabilities.description: End-to-end marketing management: campaign intake, audience segmentation, real-time journey orchestration across channels, event management, lead scoring and handoff, and consent/compliance.

capabilities.name: Customer Insights - Data (CDP)
capabilities.description: End-to-end management of customer data ingestion, unification, enrichment, measures/predictions, segmentation, and privacy governance across all Contoso source systems.
components: Sync Churn Prediction to Loyalty Tier
Consent Verified Guard for Segment Activation
Data Source Health Alert to Teams

capabilities.name: Finance
capabilities.description: End-to-end financial management for Contoso: general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, budgeting, fixed assets, and tax/compliance, surfaced through Dataverse via dual-write with D365 Finance.

capabilities.name: Supply Chain Management
capabilities.description: End-to-end plan-to-produce and procure-to-receive operations spanning demand planning, procurement, inventory, warehousing, production visibility, and outbound logistics for Contoso, integrated with D365 Finance & Operations via dual-write and virtual entities.
components: Generate PO in F&O on Approval

capabilities.name: Commerce
capabilities.description: End-to-end retail commerce operations spanning channel setup, product assortment and pricing, in-store and online transaction capture, loyalty and rewards, gift cards, and statement settlement / back-office reconciliation across POS, call center, and e-commerce channels. Built on Dynamics 365 Commerce (F&O runtime) with tables surfaced to Dataverse via dual-write and virtual entities.

capabilities.name: Human Resources
capabilities.description: Manage the workforce lifecycle at Contoso from hire to retire — organizational structure, employment, compensation, leave and absence, performance, and employee relations across all legal entities.

capabilities.name: Contact Center / Omnichannel
capabilities.description: End-to-end management of omnichannel customer interactions from channel entry through routing, agent handling, and post-interaction quality and cost governance.
components: Set VIP Flag on High-Value Customer

capabilities.name: Platform & Governance (shared core)
capabilities.description: Cross-cutting Center-of-Excellence governance of the Contoso Power Platform / Dataverse estate: environment lifecycle, ALM, security, data protection and maker compliance.
